rationale: Educ. Code §32.153 governs disclosure of student covered information by online service operators. It is wholly unrelated to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount and contains no provision affected by the proposed change.
quote: Sec. 32.153. ALLOWED DISCLOSURE OF COVERED INFORMATION.
_note: Rule text concerns student data privacy; no nexus to property tax homestead exemption.
